visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene opens in a large industrial warehouse. A woman with a dark blue beret and a white lace top is smiling broadly at the camera while holding a gold-colored plastic bag of Aunt Stella fruit cakes. Her facial expressions are animated and cheerful. The background consists of tall metal shelving units filled with various boxed consumer goods under bright warehouse lighting. (2) There is a quick cut to a close-up of a warehouse shelf. A cardboard display box containing Aunt Stella branded packages is positioned next to red boxes of crepes. A white price tag on the shelf above shows the price of 299. The lighting remains bright and functional. (3) The camera returns to the woman in the warehouse. She is gesturing toward the product and the shelves with her hands, pointing and moving the bag to emphasize her excitement. Her mouth is moving as she speaks directly into the camera. Other shoppers are dimly visible in the far background. (4) The setting changes to an indoor living room. Two women are seated at a table. The woman from the previous phases and a second woman with straight black hair wearing a black top. They are holding open the cake packages and taking bites. They gesture with their hands to describe the texture. In the background, there is a shelving unit with plush toys and household items under soft, warm lighting.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 超隱藏款 1個150元. [Slogan]: 詩特莉 水果磅蛋糕. [Subtitle]: 看我找到什麼. (2) [Subtitle]: 我來好事多找詩特莉 已經找了4趟有了. (3) [Subtitle]: 終於剛剛比爾說 沒有詩特莉. [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. (4) [Subtitle]: 他說老奶奶沒有. [Variety]: 老奶奶就在這裡. (5) [Subtitle]: 他藏在那個薄餅 因為他很少. (6) [Subtitle]: 他每次不管是餅乾或磅蛋糕 很快就會被掃光. (7) [Subtitle]: 因為他只有在百貨公司賣 百貨公司都很貴 所以這邊很便宜. (8) [Subtitle]: 買來試看看 啊可是我想吃餅乾. (9) [Subtitle]: 可是我買不到餅乾 先從磅蛋糕開始 而且他磅蛋糕也很有名. (10) [Subtitle]: 檸檬的跟香橙 來看有沒有跟百貨公司一樣好吃. (11) [Subtitle]: 喜歡高質感點心的朋友不要錯過. [Variety]: 史上最便宜 詩特莉在好市多. (12) [Subtitle]: 以前只能在百貨公司買到 要稱重的詩特莉蛋糕跟餅乾. (13) [Subtitle]: 這裡直接有 而且他一個200克 只要150元台幣 這樣子. (14) [Variety]: 299元 超級無敵划算. (15) [Subtitle]: 他的檸檬超濃郁超炸裂 你咬一口. [Variety]: 超濃郁超炸裂. (16) [Subtitle]: 你好像一堆檸檬寶寶在你嘴巴裡跳舞. (17) [Subtitle]: 你會從檸檬的那皮到中間果肉 裡面那個中心的果汁. (18) [Subtitle]: 都吃到的感覺很厲害 像一堆檸檬在你嘴巴裡翻滾. (19) [Subtitle]: 香橙的部分就是吃起來很溫潤 很有層次 非常優雅優雅. (20) [Subtitle]: 感覺一吃那個鳥語花香. [Variety]: 非常優雅. (21) [Subtitle]: 超級厲害 而且價格真的很划算. [Variety]: 真的很划算. (22) [Subtitle]: 最重要是它的口感都很濕潤柔軟 不會乾哦.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator in the warehouse, joined by 1 female friend in the indoor scene.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman wearing a dark blue beret and a white lace sleeveless top with black shoulder straps.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Industrial warehouse with high metal shelves and boxed goods, transitioning to a domestic living room with a couch, table, and toy-filled shelves.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched female voice speaks with rapid enthusiasm and high vocal arousal. The background music is a steady electronic pop track with a strong 4/4 beat and bright synth textures. The acoustic atmosphere reflects a large indoor space with a slight low-frequency hum. (2) There is a soft percussive sound followed by continued fast-paced female narration. The vocal tone is cheerful and persuasive. The BGM remains constant in tempo and volume, providing a energetic bed for the speech. (3) The audio texture shifts slightly as the narrator is joined by a second female voice. Both exhibit high-valence, positive tones. Subtle sounds of packaging being rustled and the sound of chewing or soft vocal reactions are audible. The BGM continues uninterrupted until the end of the recording.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Explanation -> Comparative Value -> Sensory Review
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a recommendation vlog for Aunt Stella fruit cakes found at Costco. The creator highlights the product's rarity and significantly lower price compared to department stores, concluding with a tasting review to validate the quality and taste for her audience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Prominent display of the brand Aunt Stella and detailed flavor review combined with price comparisons.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-energy social media editing style with dense text overlays and rhythmic music to maintain engagement.
